en-GB.name: Legacy Audio Test
en-GB.summary: A private test of legacy display templates with AudioPlayer.
en-GB.description: A minimal development skill used to test whether the legacy Display.RenderTemplate interface hands over correctly to Alexa AudioPlayer on an Echo Show.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask legacy audio test to play test

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Open the skill on an Echo Show. It should speak a short line, render a legacy BodyTemplate2 card, and start the test audio stream. Leave the screen and press Now Playing to check whether the native AudioPlayer view is restored.
